observations: A mature, fit woman stands upright in a sleeveless wrapped plum top, fitted dark trousers, and heeled boots while holding a framed rectangular tablet covered in circular diagrams and script.
Her viewer-right hand reaches toward the viewer in an open invitation or command; the other arm hangs straight with the heavy tablet.
Fine orange-lit cracks spread across the face, neck, chest, and both arms, while many thin pins or thorns radiate from the braided hair.
A tilted head, direct sideward eye contact, lifted cheek, and restrained half-smile create composed social control rather than physical exertion.
defects: The trousers, belt, boots, hair, and tablet share dark values with the background, reducing separation through the lower body and carried prop.
The glowing cracks and hair pins are fine, repeated details that contribute little to the outer contour and become visually secondary to the ordinary humanoid stance.
No target, defensive posture, or contact explains how the open hand and diagram tablet operate in immediate combat.
uncertainties: The image does not resolve whether the skin cracks are a controlled power, spreading injury, restraint, or unavoidable bodily cost.
The open hand can read as welcome, recruitment, demand, spellcasting, or threat.

observations: Three silhouettes show the same pinned-braid woman with the same rectangular diagram tablet while changing the free hand from open presentation, to a close pinching gesture, to a fully extended stop or casting gesture.
All three retain a medium-height feminine humanoid body, fitted wrapped clothing, heeled boots, dangling braids, and one carried tablet.
The left candidate most closely matches the master's narrow stance, low tablet, and open hand.
defects: The alternatives vary pose and arm extension but do not materially change body plan, prop class, garment family, or primary visual mechanism.
The radiating hair pins and individual braids are narrow contour features vulnerable to reduction.
Without internal tablet markings and skin cracks, the silhouette reads primarily as a standing woman holding a rectangle.
uncertainties: The A, B, and C labels identify alternatives but do not mark which alternative was selected.

observations: The crop shows a mature conventionally attractive face turned slightly away while the eyes look back toward the viewer under one subtly raised brow.
Closed lips curve into a small asymmetrical smile; the lifted cheek and backward glance suggest appraisal, confidence, or controlled invitation.
Orange-lit skin fissures cross the face and neck, while pinned braids and a few loose strands frame the composed expression with visible bodily damage.
defects: The restrained smile and smooth brow can also read as a polished portrait or beauty-model expression without the extended hand and body context.
No visible fear response, strain, or break in control specifies what the character refuses to reveal.
uncertainties: Unaided inspection cannot distinguish whether the eye contact seeks trust, submission, complicity, or simple attention.

observations: At native size the upright feminine figure, outward hand, long dark legs, and rectangular tablet remain distinguishable.
The skin and plum torso provide modest contrast while hair, trousers, boots, and tablet merge toward the dark background.
Facial expression, glowing fissures, hair pins, braids, tablet diagrams, and garment construction collapse below reliable recognition.
defects: The supernatural skin-crack treatment is not independently visible at native size.
The figure reduces to a slim humanoid with one extended arm and one rectangle, leaving little specific role or threat information.
uncertainties: The thumbnail does not reveal whether the tablet is a spell focus, shield, document, weapon, or carried board.
